fields.label: Custom Author Name
fields.name: blog_hero_custom_author
fields.instructions: Override the default author name displayed in the hero. Leave empty to use the post author.

fields.label: Custom Publication Date
fields.name: blog_hero_custom_date
fields.instructions: Override the default publication date. Leave empty to use the post date.

fields.label: Hero Featured Image Override
fields.name: blog_hero_featured_image_override
fields.instructions: Optional: Override the featured image specifically for the hero section. Leave empty to use the post featured image.

fields.label: Custom Excerpt
fields.name: blog_custom_excerpt
fields.instructions: Custom excerpt for archive/card display. If empty, WordPress excerpt or auto-generated excerpt will be used.

fields.label: Excerpt Length (words)
fields.name: blog_excerpt_length
fields.instructions: Number of words for auto-generated excerpt in blog cards. Default: 20

fields.label: Show Enterprise CTA
fields.name: blog_enterprise_cta_enabled
fields.instructions: Toggle to show/hide the Enterprise CTA section on this blog post

fields.label: CTA Title
fields.name: blog_enterprise_cta_title
fields.instructions: Title for the Enterprise CTA section

fields.label: CTA Description
fields.name: blog_enterprise_cta_text
fields.instructions: Description text for the Enterprise CTA section
fields.default_value: Scale your growth with strategies built for enterprise. From SEO to content and paid media, we align every channel with your business goals.

fields.label: CTA Button
fields.name: blog_enterprise_cta_button
fields.instructions: Button link for the Enterprise CTA section

fields.label: CTA Image
fields.name: blog_enterprise_cta_image
fields.instructions: Rocket illustration or image for the Enterprise CTA section

fields.label: Meta Description
fields.name: blog_meta_description
fields.instructions: Custom meta description for SEO. If empty, excerpt will be used.

fields.label: Open Graph Image
fields.name: blog_og_image
fields.instructions: Custom OG image for social sharing. If empty, featured image will be used.

fields.label: Focus Keyword
fields.name: blog_focus_keyword
fields.instructions: Primary keyword for this blog post (for SEO purposes)
